narrative: No HACCP plan documented for this RTE ready-to-eat facility. Salmonella positive on environmental swab in zone 2 (post-CCP). CCP deviation on cook-temperature CCP without corrective action documented. No FSVP for the imported peanut paste — undeclared peanut found in 'almond' product, classified as Class I recall. Sanitation failure: ATP swabs exceed threshold on slicer + dicer. Allergen cross-contact: peanut + tree-nut + milk handled without segregation controls. PCQI training lapsed 18 months ago. No traceability for FTL items (leafy greens). Supplier audit not completed in past 12 months.
